query:
ALTER TABLE game_skill_catalog
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rarity VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'common',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cooldown INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS power_percent INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS learn_level INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acquire_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'shop',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shop_price INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_monster_id VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hidden_trigger TEXT DEFAULT NULL;

ALTER TABLE game_achievements
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ach_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ach_rarity VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'common',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS condition_params JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reward_content JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS title_reward VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS glow_effect VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL;
